name: static-scene
attribution: Rajani Gairshail — Wikimedia Commons, https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Natural_landscape_(Himachal_Pradesh).webm , CC BY-SA 4.0.
expected: Almost everything lands in the static cloud; few/no dynamic points or ribbons. The negative control — proves the static/dynamic split does not hallucinate motion (a near-static mountain-valley scene with only minor camera motion).
